Title: Relates to access to prescription medication and coordination with workers' compensation board regulations governing network pharmacy use
Summary: Codifies certain regulations of the workers' compensation board relating to access to prescription medication and coordination with workers' compensation board regulations governing network pharmacy use; requires the workers' compensation board to file a report on out-of-network pharmacy use within 3 years of the effective date.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the workers' compensation law, in relation to access to prescription medication and coordination with workers' compensation board regulations governing network pharmacy use
